title: Batch recall alert for Vey Tosal 100 mg/ml + 0.05 mg/ml Solution for Injection
body: "We wish to inform veterinarians that Veyx-Pharma GmbH has initiated a Class II recall to veterinarian level with immediate effect for Vey Tosal 100 mg/ml + 0.05 mg/ml solution for injection  Vm 27569/3000.  The reason for this recall is due to the presence of particles observed in the batch.  The recall is for:     Batch number Expiry date     23K019 11/2026     For further information regarding the recall, please contact: pharmacovigilance@veyx.de or +49 5686 9986 0 (general), alternatively +49 5686 9986 62 (24hr availability). "
